m7_candidate_roadmap.scope: Rich TWSE MIS / TAIFEX observation contract expansion; no new source; expose richer quote snapshot facts.
Market Context Package plus richer AI Markdown/MCP context and bounded cross-instrument summaries.
Official TWSE/TPEx EOD context expansion and canonical/recent daily baseline.
Optional Yahoo/FinMind historical context with coverage and delay caveats.
Fugle/Fubon credential-gated provider research only; no implementation until compliance decisions exist.

source_families.credential_or_access_requirements: No credentials; may require browser-like headers/cookie behavior and low-frequency usage.
source_families.current_ai_context_usage: Only one price-like value plus timestamp/freshness/caveats is surfaced for successful rows.
source_families.display_name: TWSE MIS browser JSON stock/index quotes
source_families.potential_ai_context_usage: Richer quote snapshot facts, displayed depth snapshot, day range, and bounded watchlist aggregates without trading interpretation.
source_families.recommended_near_term_action: M7A expand normalized observation contract using already-known TWSE MIS fields; do not add a new source.
source_families.stability_notes: Implemented but fragile browser JSON contract; no official realtime SLA is asserted.

source_families.credential_or_access_requirements: No credentials observed for bounded probe; licensed data may be needed for SLA-backed use.
source_families.current_ai_context_usage: Front-month TX value with contract metadata, timestamp, status, and caveats.

source_families.potential_ai_context_usage: TX context adjacent to TAIEX/watchlist if richer fields are validated.
source_families.recommended_near_term_action: M7A inspect fixture/evidence before adding richer fields; mark missing OHLC/depth as unknown until proven.
source_families.stability_notes: Official browser endpoint but not a licensed feed contract; current parser only proves selected fields.
